dsl_rule.translation_notes: Converted 'price sequence' (N consecutive bars in expected direction) to directional close comparisons using prev_close. Directional move of 1.5% expressed using returns indicator (0.015 decimal scale). Volume confirmation uses volume > sma_20 as proxy for 20-day MA. Take profit set to 6.0% (3x the 2% stop loss). Context-dependent direction allows both long and short entries based on sequence direction. High timeframe conflict filter not implementable with allowed indicators.

backtest_rule.reason: Converted 'price sequence' (N consecutive bars in expected direction) to directional close comparisons using prev_close. Directional move of 1.5% expressed using returns indicator (0.015 decimal scale). Volume confirmation uses volume > sma_20 as proxy for 20-day MA. Take profit set to 6.0% (3x the 2% stop loss). Context-dependent direction allows both long and short entries based on sequence direction. High timeframe conflict filter not implementable with allowed indicators.

source_rule_text: Combine price sequence setups with directional price confirmation signals to increase setup reliability beyond simple price data alone.
